title: In Our Time
author: Ernest Hemingway
description: In Our Time has a curious history in that Earnest Hemingway released it in at least three different versions. The first edition (the 1924 Paris edition) was commissioned by Ezra Pound for Three Mountains Press and contains six prose vignettes. The collection explores loss, grief, separation, and alienation—topics Hemingway would never leave behind. Until Ezra Pound asked him to write this collection, Hemingway was primarily a writer of non-fiction. This collection would forever change that. Hemi...
subjects: American fiction (fictional works by one author)
